spec.name: Nero Drive
spec.description: This is a busy paved road that runs north through the city. The people of Rome are very friendly and say hello as you pass. A gate leading out of the city lies to the south and a small path goes west towards a nobleman's estate. To the east, off in the distance, lies the great mountain. It is rumored that the Gods watch over and protect the empire from there.

north.description: Nero Drive leads in that direction.

south.description: You see many people entering and leaving the city through a large gate in the walls protecting the city.

west.description: It looks like a nobleman's estate. We are talking RICH nobleman's estate.
